Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

    The given name of a natural person; Conventionally known as 'first name' in most English-speaking countries.

    The given name of a natural person; Conventionally known as 'first name' in most English-speaking countries.
    TrustedContact.Builder
    mailingAddress(TrustedContactMailingAddress mailingAddress)
    The object containing data for the purpose of delivery physical mailings to a party; Typically used for statements, account updates, tax documents, and other postal mailings; May also be used as an alternative identity verification address to personalAddress.
    TrustedContact.Builder
    mailingAddress(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends TrustedContactMailingAddress> mailingAddress)
    The object containing data for the purpose of delivery physical mailings to a party; Typically used for statements, account updates, tax documents, and other postal mailings; May also be used as an alternative identity verification address to personalAddress.
    TrustedContact.Builder
    middleNames(String middleNames)
    Non-primary names representing a natural person; Name attributed to a person other than "Given" and "Family" names.
    TrustedContact.Builder
    middleNames(Optional<String> middleNames)
    Non-primary names representing a natural person; Name attributed to a person other than "Given" and "Family" names.
    TrustedContact.Builder
    name(String name)
    The name field Format: {parent=account/*}/{name=trustedContacts/*}
    TrustedContact.Builder
    name(Optional<String> name)
    The name field Format: {parent=account/*}/{name=trustedContacts/*}
    TrustedContact.Builder
    phoneNumber(TrustedContactPhoneNumber phoneNumber)
    The phone number for a party; this value exists on the party record in the context of the account and does not commute to other accounts held by/for the person
    TrustedContact.Builder
    phoneNumber(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends TrustedContactPhoneNumber> phoneNumber)
    The phone number for a party; this value exists on the party record in the context of the account and does not commute to other accounts held by/for the person
    TrustedContact.Builder
    trustedContactId(String trustedContactId)
    A system-generated unique identifier referencing a Trusted Contact person on an account; Used to access the record after creation
    TrustedContact.Builder
    trustedContactId(Optional<String> trustedContactId)
    A system-generated unique identifier referencing a Trusted Contact person on an account; Used to access the record after creation

    • mailingAddress

      public TrustedContact.Builder mailingAddress(TrustedContactMailingAddress mailingAddress)
      The object containing data for the purpose of delivery physical mailings to a party; Typically used for statements, account updates, tax documents, and other postal mailings; May also be used as an alternative identity verification address to personalAddress. If input, the required fields within the `mailing_address` object include: - `administrative_area` - `region_code` - 2 character CLDR Code - `postal_code` - `locality` - `address_lines` - max 5 lines

    • mailingAddress

      public TrustedContact.Builder mailingAddress(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends TrustedContactMailingAddress> mailingAddress)
      The object containing data for the purpose of delivery physical mailings to a party; Typically used for statements, account updates, tax documents, and other postal mailings; May also be used as an alternative identity verification address to personalAddress. If input, the required fields within the `mailing_address` object include: - `administrative_area` - `region_code` - 2 character CLDR Code - `postal_code` - `locality` - `address_lines` - max 5 lines

    • middleNames

      public TrustedContact.Builder middleNames(String middleNames)
      Non-primary names representing a natural person; Name attributed to a person other than "Given" and "Family" names.

    • middleNames

      public TrustedContact.Builder middleNames(Optional<String> middleNames)
      Non-primary names representing a natural person; Name attributed to a person other than "Given" and "Family" names.

      The name field Format: {parent=account/*}/{name=trustedContacts/*}
